title: oritrophium hieracioides
intro: Oritrophium hieracioides, also known as Hieracium pilosella or false hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Oritrophium hieracioides include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
